title: tylophora vomitoria
intro: Tylophora vomitoria, also known as Asperula odorata or 'Kavach,' is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory effects. The plant is also known to have antibacterial, antifungal, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its health benefits in treating infections and improving overall well-being. Tylophora vomitoria can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
